medialive.channel.nielsencbet.CbetCheckD.Description: Enter the CBET check digits to use in the watermark.

medialive.channel.nielsencbet.CbetStepas.Description: Determines the method of CBET insertion mode when prior encoding is detected on the same layer.

medialive.channel.nielsencbet.Csid.Description: Enter the CBET Source ID (CSID) to use in the watermark
